# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please use GitHub Security Advisories (private vulnerability reporting) for suspected security issues in `fisiCs`.

Do not open public issues for unpatched vulnerabilities.

## What to Include

- Affected commit/version
- Reproduction steps
- Input files/flags needed to trigger the issue
- Impact summary (crash, memory safety, code execution risk, etc.)
- Any known workaround

## Response Expectations

- Maintainers will acknowledge valid reports as quickly as possible.
- Fix timing depends on severity and maintainer availability.
- Public disclosure should wait until a patch or mitigation is available.
